description_long: This is a modern, single-story house enclosed by white perimeter walls, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The front yard includes a landscaped garden with shrubs and a tree, as well as a wooden deck area. The rear section of the property has a patio with a pergola, two palm trees, and a small pool or water feature. Large glass windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and wood, with clean lines and a neutral color palette. The overall layout is open and spacious, with distinct zones for relaxation, greenery, and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a rear patio with a pergola and pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated front angle, highlighting the landscaped garden, wooden deck, and the main glass facade.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the street-facing side, emphasizing the large glass windows and the white perimeter wall.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, featuring the pergola-covered patio, palm trees, and a small pool or water feature.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side perspective, focusing on the flat roof structure and the transition between the front garden and rear patio.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with large glass doors, minimal steps, and a clean, open approach with no porch or columns.
